/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtemplate_driver_crospi.so -o libtemplate_driver_crospi.so CMakeFiles/template_driver_crospi.dir/src/template_driver_crospi.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib -lfmt -ljsoncpp /opt/ros/humble/lib/libament_index_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libclass_loader.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.1.0 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so
